questions.question: What is a set in mathematics?
Which of the following is a set?
What is the symbol for a set?
What is a subset?
options: A set that is contained within another set
A set that contains all elements

questions.question: What is the symbol for subset?
What is a proper subset?
options: A subset that is not equal to the set
A subset that is equal to the set

questions.question: What is the symbol for proper subset?
What is an empty set?
What is the symbol for an empty set?
What is a universal set?
options: A set that contains all elements under consideration

questions.question: What is the symbol for universal set?
What is a finite set?
options: A set with a limited number of elements

questions.question: What is an infinite set?
options: A set with unlimited number of elements

questions.question: What is the union of two sets?
options: All elements that are in either set
All elements that are in both sets
All elements that are in neither set
All elements that are in the first set only

questions.question: What is the symbol for union?
What is the intersection of two sets?
options: All elements that are in either set
All elements that are in both sets
All elements that are in neither set
All elements that are in the first set only

questions.question: What is the symbol for intersection?
What is the complement of a set?
options: All elements not in the set

questions.question: What is the symbol for complement?
What is a Venn diagram?
options: A diagram that shows relationships between sets

questions.question: What is a disjoint set?
What is the element symbol?
What is the not element symbol?
What is a power set?
options: The set of all subsets of a set

questions.question: What is the cardinality of a set?
options: The number of elements in the set
The sum of elements in the set
The product of elements in the set
The average of elements in the set

questions.question: What is the cardinality of set A = {1, 2, 3}?
What is the cardinality of an empty set?
What is the difference of two sets?
options: Elements in the first set but not in the second

questions.question: What is a singleton set?
options: A set with exactly one element

questions.question: What is the cardinality of A × B if |A| = 3 and |B| = 4?
